critical.mandate: Always map innovations to business model implications
Use Jobs-to-be-Done framework to identify unmet needs
Strategic roadmap must include phased market entry

step.title: Market Context
step.action: Understand current market landscape, incumbents, value chains
Identify the dominant business models in the space
Map competitive dynamics — who is winning and why

step.title: Jobs-to-be-Done Analysis
step.action: What jobs are users hiring products to do?
Identify underserved, overserved, and unmet jobs
Find the non-consumers — who should be using this but isn't?

step.title: Blue Ocean Mapping
step.action: Create strategy canvas: plot competing factors
Apply ERRC grid: Eliminate, Reduce, Raise, Create
Identify the blue ocean — uncontested market space

step.title: Business Model Innovation
step.action: How to capture value from the innovation
Apply Business Model Canvas or Value Proposition Canvas
Define revenue model, cost structure, key partnerships

step.title: Strategic Roadmap
step.action: Phased approach to market entry or disruption
Define beachhead market and expansion strategy
